scope.target: Create a Traditional Chinese translation of the final AI context audit report.
scope.dependency_radius: One source report, one translated report, and translation workflow records.
constraints: Preserve all finding IDs, severity values, paths, commands, skill names, scores, tables, and code fences.
Do not change audit conclusions or remediate findings.
Do not read or scan product source or tests.

inputs.architecture_target: A faithful human-facing zh-TW translation adjacent to the English audit report.
user_constraints: Use a sub-agent with minimal context to control cost.
Explain which findings were affected by completed work.
Avoid duplicating remediation functionality already present.

steps: Translate the report through a fresh bounded sub-agent.
Record validation and close the workflow.
validation: table row and code fence parity
deferred_items: Implementing a reusable remediation capability remains a separate user decision.

results.summary: Created and reviewed a Traditional Chinese Taiwan translation of the final AI context audit report while preserving the English source and all structural evidence.
tests_run: finding ID parity: 9/9 with zero differences
command code block parity: zero differences
English source report working-tree diff: zero lines
main-agent Traditional Chinese terminology review: passed
